text.content:
♦ Dominate

Level 1: Cloud Memory

Cost: Free | Pool: Cha + Dominate | Type: Utility

Erase the last few minutes (up to about 5 minutes) from a mortal's memory with the phrase 'Forget.' The target loses all recollection of the erased period and fills the gap with plausible mundane memories. Works automatically on mortals. Vampires of equal or higher generation can resist with Wits + Resolve vs your pool. Requires eye contact. Does not work through electronic media.

Level 1: Compel

Cost: Free | Pool: Cha + Dominate vs Int + Resolve | Type: Combat

Issue a single short command (maximum 2-3 words) that the target must immediately obey: 'Stop,' 'Run,' 'Drop it,' 'Sleep,' 'Speak.' The command must be something the target could physically accomplish. Self-destructive commands ('Die') fail automatically. The compulsion lasts one turn. Requires eye contact and the target must hear and understand you. Vampires of higher generation are immune.

Level 2: Mesmerize

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Dominate vs Int + Resolve | Type: Combat

Implant a complex suggestion or post-hypnotic command in the target's mind. The command can include triggers ('When you see the Prince, hand them this envelope') and can be multi-step. The target carries out the command believing it to be their own idea. The suggestion lasts until fulfilled or until the next sunrise, whichever comes first. More successes = more complex commands accepted. Commands that endanger the target grant them a Willpower roll to resist. Requires unbroken eye contact during implantation (about 1 minute).

Level 2: Dementation

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Dominate vs Composure + Int | Type: Combat

Amalgam: Obfuscate 2

Inflict temporary madness on a target. Choose a mental derangement (paranoia, hallucinations, catatonia, uncontrollable rage, etc.) — the target suffers from it for the remainder of the scene. Mortals may develop lasting trauma. Vampires shake it off at dawn. The specific manifestation is influenced by the target's Nature and existing psychological vulnerabilities. Requires eye contact. Contested — target resists with Composure + Int.

Level 3: The Forgetful Mind

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Dominate vs Int + Resolve | Type: Combat

Rewrite or completely remove memories from a target's mind. You can alter memories of events going back months or years. The process takes about 5 minutes of unbroken eye contact per memory being altered. More successes = more seamless the alteration. Poorly crafted memories (1-2 successes) may feel 'wrong' to the target and could unravel under therapy or Auspex. A critical win creates memories indistinguishable from real ones. Multiple sessions can rewrite entire life histories. This is a powerful Masquerade tool.

Level 3: Submerged Directive

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Dominate vs Int + Resolve | Type: Combat

Implant a command that lies dormant until triggered by a specific condition you define: 'When you hear church bells, walk to Elysium.' The trigger can be a time, event, phrase, or sensory experience. The command can be complex (several sentences). The target is completely unaware of the implanted directive until it triggers. Once triggered, it functions as Mesmerize. The directive lasts indefinitely until triggered, but fades after one lunar cycle if not activated. Only one Submerged Directive per target at a time.

Level 4: Rationalize

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Passive enhancement to all your Dominate powers. Targets of your Dominate no longer feel that they were commanded — they genuinely believe the implanted thoughts and actions were their own ideas. They will rationalize and defend the behavior if questioned. This makes Dominate nearly undetectable by mundane means. Even Auspex requires 3+ successes to identify the influence. This applies to Compel, Mesmerize, Submerged Directive, and Forgetful Mind.

Level 5: Mass Manipulation

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Man + Dominate | Type: Combat

Use Compel or Mesmerize on a crowd of mortals simultaneously (up to approximately 20 people). You must be able to address the crowd — a speech, announcement, or broadcast. All targets must hear you. Roll once; the result applies to all targets. Individual targets with Resolve 4+ may resist separately. Cannot be used on crowds containing vampires (use normal Dominate for them individually). Duration and effects as per the base power used.

Level 5: Terminal Decree

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: Man + Dominate vs Composure + Resolve | Type: Combat

Implant a command so deeply that violating it causes the target physical harm or death. The target who breaks the command suffers: mortals take a heart attack (potentially lethal), vampires take 3 Aggravated Willpower damage and must check for frenzy. Alternatively, you can implant a command that the target literally cannot disobey — their body refuses to act against it. Requires 10 minutes of unbroken eye contact and an extended contested roll. The decree lasts until broken or removed by a Dominate user of higher generation.
